name: Stuffed Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 package Long grain and wild rice
4 large Spring sweet onions, approximately 1 pound each
1/2 lb Fully cooked Kielbasa, sausage, sliced 1/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the rice according to package directions without using margarine. Let it stand covered.
2. Peel the onions and slice off the tops and bottoms to level them.
3. Place the onions in an 8-inch square glass dish and cover with vented plastic wrap.
4. Microwave on high for 10 minutes.
5. Carefully remove the plastic wrap and scoop out half of each onion's center, reserving it for another use. Use tongs to hold the onion while removing the center.
6. Fill each onion cup with rice mixture.
7. Insert sausage slices between the edge of the filling and the onion cup; re-cover.
8. Rotate each onion halfway through cooking and microwave on high for an additional 5 minutes, or until the onions are crisp tender.
9. Garnish each with parsley.
Nutrient data per serving: 362 calories; 11 grams protein; 13 grams fat (32% of total calories); 50 grams carbohydrates; 6 grams dietary fiber; 30 milligrams cholesterol; 780 milligrams sodium.
